# SDR GROW

> The outbound operating system built for recruitment agencies.

SDR GROW is a structured 16-touch outbound system that multiplies recruitment agency pipeline without multiplying payroll. It combines industry intelligence, competitor interception, and authority-based positioning into a single operating system.

## Core Offering

- **16-Touch Outreach Engine**: 8 email touches + 8 LinkedIn touches in a coordinated multi-channel sequence
- **8 Power Modules**: Leads, Email Pipeline, Outreach Flow, LinkedIn Spy, Competitors Blogs Spy, Industry Insight, Competitor Mentions, Brand Voice
- **Built for Recruitment Agencies**: Specifically designed for boutique recruiters, staffing firms, and recruitment agencies

## Key Capabilities

- Structured outbound infrastructure (not ad-hoc outreach)
- Designation-matched sender logic (authority-based positioning)
- Competitor monitoring and interception (up to 10 competitors)
- Industry intelligence reports (6 report types)
- Brand voice consistency across all channels
- LinkedIn engagement and visibility amplification
- LinkedIn spy and AI-powered content generation
- Blog spy with SEO and AEO content generation
- Brand mention monitoring and real-time tracking
- Behavior-based follow-up sequencing
- Optional 24/7 dedicated virtual assistant

## Pricing

- Setup: $1,997 (one-time)
- Monthly: $1,200/month
- Optional VA Add-on: $2,000/month
- 60-day setup fee guarantee

## Target Audience

- Recruitment agencies doing consistent placements
- Boutique recruiters who've outgrown referrals
- Staffing firms wanting predictable client acquisition
- Placement fees $5k+ with proven delivery capability

## Results

- 8-15% reply rates (vs 1-2% industry average)
- 5,000+ emails per month capacity
- Predictable, qualified pipeline generation
